ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type being simulated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the simulation was run */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the simulation was conducted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil type used in the simulation */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition used in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crop_types ("crop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_soil_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_type_id") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "application_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the treatment was applied */,
  "application_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to apply the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_application_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_method_id") REFERENCES treatment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stages" (
  "growth_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth stage entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this growth stage belongs to */,
  "firstsquare_DAS_50pc" REAL /* Days after sowing (DAS) at 50% first square appearance */,
  "firstflower_DAS_50pc" REAL /* Days after sowing (DAS) at 50% first flower appearance */,
  "harvest_DAS_50pc" REAL /* Days after sowing (DAS) at 50% harvest */,
  "height" REAL /* Average plant height in centimeters */,
  "leaf_area_index" REAL /* Leaf area index of the plants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_stages_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_treatments" (
  "simulation_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between simulation and treatment */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_treatments_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_access_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "optimal_soil_ph" REAL /* Optimal soil pH for the crop */,
  "optimal_temperature_range" TEXT /* Optimal temperature range for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation in the weather condition */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity in the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil type */,
  "ph_range" TEXT /* pH range of the soil type */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
